property.name: vm_manager_user
property.description: User to run Azure VM Manager service as.

property.name: vm_manager_group
property.description: Group for Azure VM Manager service.

property.name: vm_manager_log_dir
property.description: Log directory for Azure VM Manager.

property.name: vm_manager_pid_dir
property.description: PID directory for Azure VM Manager.

property.name: vm_manager_data_dir
property.description: State directory for VM inventory and operation logs.

property.name: vm_manager_port
property.description: Port for the VM Manager REST API daemon.

property.name: vm_manager_mode
property.description: Mode of operation: 'managed' creates and deletes VMs, 'existing' uses pre-provisioned VMs.

property.name: vm_manager_tls_enabled
property.description: Enable TLS/HTTPS for the VM Manager REST API.

property.name: vm_manager_tls_cert_path
property.description: Path to the TLS certificate (PEM). If empty and TLS enabled, a self-signed cert is generated.

property.name: vm_manager_tls_key_path
property.description: Path to the TLS private key (PEM).

property.name: vm_manager_daily_budget
property.description: Daily budget limit for cluster compute costs. 0 = no limit. Triggers alert when exceeded.
